title: M4-02a: Enhance ActivityFeed with timeline format and timestamps
acceptance_criteria: Events show timestamp in format: 'HH:MM' or relative time
Event types displayed with distinct icons: message, approval, command, error, completion
Auto-scroll to latest event with toggle to disable
Group events by time period (Now, X minutes ago, X hours ago)
deliverables: Modified: ActivityFeed.tsx with enhanced timeline display
